title: Creamy Uruguayan Tartare
description: A unique twist on traditional tartare, featuring a creamy twist with a Uruguayan flair. This dish is perfect for adventurous foodies.

ingredients.name: Creamy sauce (optional)
ingredients.notes: such as aioli or sriracha mayo

ingredients.name: Tartare mix-ins (optional)
ingredients.notes: such as diced onions, capers, or pickled jalapeño

instructions: 1. Freeze the steak for at least 30 minutes to firm it up.
2. Using a sharp knife, finely chop the steak into small pieces.
3. In a bowl, gently mix together the chopped steak, diced avocado, and creamy sauce (if using).
4. Season the mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
5. If desired, add tartare mix-ins and gently fold them into the mixture.
6. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
7. Serve the tartare on toasted bread or crackers, garnished with additional avocado slices if desired.
